title: Stardew Valley Mod
description: The definitive mod for merging Minecraft and Stardew Valley into one gameplay experience (also available as a datapack)
body:
**The Stardew Valley Mod** includes **over [550 items](https://stardew-valley-minecraft-datapack.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Items)**, ranging in function from [weapon](https://stardew-valley-minecraft-datapack.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Weapons)/[tool](https://stardew-valley-minecraft-datapack.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Tools)/[armor sets](https://stardew-valley-minecraft-datapack.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Armor) from both Vanilla and [custom ores](https://stardew-valley-minecraft-datapack.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Ores), to special items that can be found in your Minecraft world, to **[new crops](https://stardew-valley-minecraft-datapack.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Crops)** that you can grow, harvest, and turn into other goods from Stardew Valley. 

There are [new blocks](https://stardew-valley-minecraft-datapack.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Blocks), both decorative and functional, as well as [usable chairs and couches](https://stardew-valley-minecraft-datapack.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Chairs). There are changes to vanilla gameplay, such as finding [vanilla and custom items when mining](https://stardew-valley-minecraft-datapack.fandom.com/wiki/Custom_Stone_Drops), [small slimes dealing damage](https://stardew-valley-minecraft-datapack.fandom.com/wiki/Slime), and only being able to find certain [fish](https://stardew-valley-minecraft-datapack.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Fish) in certain conditions, all done to reflect gameplay in Stardew Valley. There’s lots to explore and even more to come!

**Works best with Optifine. Some key features do not visually appear without it.**

**Required resource pack:**

To use this mod, you must download and equip the resource pack that is provided— if you wish to add Stardew Valley music, you may also download that one if you wish, though it is very large.

**The wiki is available at the following link:**

**https://stardew-valley-minecraft-datapack.fandom.com/wiki/Stardew_Valley_Minecraft_Datapack_Wiki**

Join the discord here: https://discord.gg/bDE3C5zE

Credit to ConcernedApe for all textures and music that are from Stardew Valley
